::: {.callout}

I'm working through the tutorial published by M. Fatih Tüzen at [A Statistician's R Notebook](https://mfatihtuzen.netlify.app/posts/2025-08-18_missing_values/), and syndicated at [R-Bloggers](https://www.r-bloggers.com/2025/08/handling-missing-data-in-r-a-comprehensive-guide/)
::: 


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Select relevant variables
nhanes_sub <- NHANES |> 
  select(ID, Age, Gender, BMI, BPSysAve, Diabetes)
glimpse(nhanes_sub)
```
